title: Jan 2024 thoughts — dad in worst state, Vic dead, Emilio as anchor (the late-night-cry note)
html:
Jan 2024 thoughts — dad in worst state, Vic dead, Emilio as anchor (the late-night-cry note)

Source: 2024-01-04 Google Doc, 2:29 AM. The most emotionally raw single note in the corpus — Yahir crying in the dark while reading A Little Life, processing his dad's collapse, Sam's incompatibility, and Vic's death.

TL;DR

  • 2:29 AM, A Little Life soundtrack on YouTube, in his feels.
  • Three bottled-up emotions Yahir works through:
    1. Dad in worst-most-given-up state Yahir has ever seen — eyelids swollen from drunken crying; resonates with the Joker; thinks the family home is still a family home; "He doesn't want to live anymore." The gut-wrench: "while I have had the thoughts that him ceasing to exist would solve a lot of burden and inconveniences, I know he has had those thoughts about himself as well." Plus the cut: "I am cut from his cloth, I am his kid, and he has influenced me for the majority of my life. Many of the things that he has taught me explicitly and implicitly will continue to my kids."
    2. Sam — "things between you and sam probably won't work, and its because of your want to hide her from you, almost like you are embarrassed about yourself when you're not." The mirror question: "Asking yourself in the mirror if you love yourself, when you haven't felt love in a long time." Foreshadows the actual breakup 4 months later.
    3. Vic is dead and it still feels blank. "He wasn't supposed to die, no one is." Yahir watches David grieve from the outside: "David is a fucking warrior, one that has been cut with a blade so deep that it hurts watching as an observer."
  • Emilio as the anchor: "I have been blessed with my brother. I will not forget this blessing, because whatever happens I'll have Emilio by my side."
  • Closing self-talk (the manifesto-pivot, even at the lowest moment): "Yahir, I love you. We are each other I am you and you are me, This isn't subconscious and conscious part, its one thing... Wow."

Key quote

"I cant put myself in dave's shoes because even scratching it sets me off."

Pattern observed

This note is Yahir's lowest documented emotional point — and the manifesto-vocabulary holds even here. The closing "Yahir, I love you, we are each other" is the same self-talk register as the September Shanghai manifesto just shifted to second-person-as-self-soothing.

The dad-as-mirror framing — "I am cut from his cloth, his teachings will continue to my kids" — is the most explicit articulation in the corpus of Yahir's anxiety about inheriting his dad's trajectory. This becomes a quiet through-line in later notes (the mom house aspiration is partly insurance against being his dad).

The Vic / David grief segment is also rare — Yahir documents the loss of Vic (someone in the extended Corvallis crew) and watches David grieve. First named instance of Vic in the corpus; David here is presumably the same David from 2025 05 30 todos.

This note + the next day continuation form a 2-day late-night-cry pair — the most concentrated bottom-of-the-cycle moment in the visible corpus. By April 2024 Yahir is back in operational mode.

Open questions

  • Vic — who? First mention. Apparent close-orbit friend whose death is a major event for the boys. Worth a stub.
  • Is the "Joker" reference Yahir's dad watching the Joker movie? ("Him resonating with the joker and patiently waiting for hours so that he can watch it with his children.")
  • David grieving Vic — same David as the David in Memory.md and 2025 05 30 todos?

  • emilio
  • vic

  • sam
  • yahir family

  • self as other self talk
